S1_BLOCKER.definition: Failure breaks trust, safety or candidate-only interpretation and blocks any future synthetic review.
examples: Usuario pode achar que estado real foi tocado.
Comprovante ausente em bloqueio ou recusa.
Dado real, API, backend ou secrets inferidos pela UI.

S2_MAJOR.definition: Failure preserves synthetic status but leaves the operator unable to make a clear decision safely.
examples: Modo degradado nao bloqueia acao parecida com execucao.

S3_MINOR.definition: Failure does not change the decision boundary but slows comprehension or makes scanning harder.
examples: Hierarquia visual atrasa leitura do contrato.
A sequencia Today -> Approve -> History nao fica imediata.

S4_POLISH.definition: Refinement improves smoothness, density or wording without changing understanding.
